title: Exis Experiment #4 - Zombie Apoc
description: A Basic zombie apocalypse modpack that has guns & mutant zombies and hordes, Bringing a simple yet unique experience.
body:
# Exi's Experiment #4 - The Zombie Apocalypse
This is a survival-horror modpack for Minecraft 1.19.2 (Forge). This pack retains the core Minecraft world and biomes but introduces a global zombie outbreak. Your goal is simple: survive.
- Utilize modern technology, heavy weaponry, and basic aerial vehicles to stay ahead of zombies

## Core Gameplay Features
- Advanced Firearms (TaCZ): Utilizing the Timeless and Classics Zero mod to provide high-quality rifles, explosive weaponry, and unique firearms for defense.
- Aerial Vehicles: Includes Immersive Aircraft, allowing players to scout the world and move between bases using biplanes and airships.
- Mutated Threats: Face off against several mutated variants from the Mutants and Zombies mod, including Blisters and Spitters, alongside significantly reworked zombie AI.
- Tactical Survival: Build underground bunkers and use ParCool! for parkour-based movement to navigate the environment and escape horde nights.
- Atmospheric Immersion: Features Sound Physics Remastered and Undead Nights to create a high-tension survival experience within standard vanilla biomes.

## Technical Details
Version: 1.19.2 Forge

Recommended RAM: Please allocate atleast 8GB as it's recommended for smooth gun animations and entity handling.

Multiplayer Ready: Includes the Essential Mod and Simple Voice Chat for far easier multiplayer setup
